item.title: Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
item.description: A farm vehicle becomes stuck during fieldwork, requiring recovery efforts and equipment to get it moving again.

media:content.media:title: Truck Gets Stuck in the Field
media:content.media:description: A farm vehicle becomes stuck during fieldwork, requiring recovery efforts and equipment to get it moving again.

item.title: Checking a Low Field Setup
item.description: Farm equipment is inspected during a low setup in the field, ensuring proper alignment and safe operation before continuing work.

media:content.media:title: Checking a Low Field Setup
media:content.media:description: Farm equipment is inspected during a low setup in the field, ensuring proper alignment and safe operation before continuing work.

item.title: Large Farm Equipment in the Field
item.description: Big farm machines are assembled and used in field operations, showing large-scale equipment working together during crop production.

media:content.media:title: Large Farm Equipment in the Field
media:content.media:description: Big farm machines are assembled and used in field operations, showing large-scale equipment working together during crop production.

item.title: New Farm Equipment Investment Arrives
item.description: A new piece of farm equipment arrives and is inspected as part of ongoing upgrades to improve efficiency in field operations.

media:content.media:title: New Farm Equipment Investment Arrives
media:content.media:description: A new piece of farm equipment arrives and is inspected as part of ongoing upgrades to improve efficiency in field operations.

item.title: Sometimes Farming Requires a Careful Guess
item.description: Farm decisions are made in changing field conditions, requiring judgment and experience to guide planting, harvesting, and equipment use.

media:content.media:title: Sometimes Farming Requires a Careful Guess
media:content.media:description: Farm decisions are made in changing field conditions, requiring judgment and experience to guide planting, harvesting, and equipment use.

item.title: A Powerful Moment in the Field
item.description: Heavy farm equipment works through field operations, capturing a strong moment of machinery, soil work, and agricultural production.

media:content.media:title: A Powerful Moment in the Field
media:content.media:description: Heavy farm equipment works through field operations, capturing a strong moment of machinery, soil work, and agricultural production.

item.title: Preparing for a Retirement Auction
item.description: Getting equipment and operations ready for a retirement auction, focusing on organization, valuation, and wrapping up years of farming work.

media:content.media:title: Preparing for a Retirement Auction
media:content.media:description: Getting equipment and operations ready for a retirement auction, focusing on organization, valuation, and wrapping up years of farming work.

item.title: A Satisfying Farm View
item.description: A calm look at farm operations in motion, highlighting equipment working the fields and the peaceful rhythm of agricultural life.

media:content.media:title: A Satisfying Farm View
media:content.media:description: A calm look at farm operations in motion, highlighting equipment working the fields and the peaceful rhythm of agricultural life.

item.title: Checking for Surface Rust on Equipment
item.description: Inspecting farm machinery for surface rust, focusing on maintenance, prevention, and keeping equipment in working condition for the season.

media:content.media:title: Checking for Surface Rust on Equipment
media:content.media:description: Inspecting farm machinery for surface rust, focusing on maintenance, prevention, and keeping equipment in working condition for the season.

item.title: Searching for a Better Farm Find
item.description: Exploring equipment and field conditions to find better solutions for farm operations, focusing on efficiency, upgrades, and practical decision-making.

media:content.media:title: Searching for a Better Farm Find
media:content.media:description: Exploring equipment and field conditions to find better solutions for farm operations, focusing on efficiency, upgrades, and practical decision-making.

item.title: Farming Keeps You Humble
item.description: A reflection on farm life and its challenges, highlighting lessons learned, unpredictable conditions, and the resilience needed in agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Farming Keeps You Humble
media:content.media:description: A reflection on farm life and its challenges, highlighting lessons learned, unpredictable conditions, and the resilience needed in agriculture.

item.title: A Surprising Farm Transformation
item.description: A noticeable change in farm operations or equipment setup, showing adaptation, upgrades, and problem-solving in daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: A Surprising Farm Transformation
media:content.media:description: A noticeable change in farm operations or equipment setup, showing adaptation, upgrades, and problem-solving in daily agricultural work.
